pi_items.source: Calculated natively in R using nrow(AssociatedPress)
Calculated natively in R using ncol(AssociatedPress)
Calculated sparsity directly from R's AssociatedPress document-term matrix which yielded 0.987
Task description and verifier.py explicitly require K=6 for the main topic modeling.
Task description strictly mandates calculating K=2, 4, 6, 8, 10.
Task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh explicitly mandate this directory.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real-world AssociatedPress dataset from the 'topicmodels' R package, containing exactly 2246 documents and a vocabulary size of 10473 words. The document-term matrix has a sparsity of approximately 0.987. The target topic model specification (K=6) and comparison models (K=2,4,6,8,10) match the explicit instructions and validation logic, outputting to /home/ga/RProjects/output.
